song.title: I Will Praise Him
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Glory, glory the Father! Glory, glory the Son! Glory, glory the Spirit! Glory to the Three in one!
[C] Chorus Let us praise Him! Let us praise Him! Praise our God the Three in One! Give Him glory; Give Him glory! Wonderous things for us our God has done!
[V2] 2) Praise the Father who has purposed! Priase the Son who all has done! Praise the Spirit who transmitteth! Praise the Three who work as one!
[E] 1) Glory, glory the Father! Glory, glory the Son! Glory, glory the Spirit! Glory to the Three in One! 2) Let us praise Him! Let us praise Him! Praise our God the Three in One! Give Him glory; Give Him glory! Wonderous things for us our God has done!
